qa_pairs.question: Why is `sudo` unavailable on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The ability to use `sudo` to obtain superuser/root permissions is not available on Alliance clusters.

qa_pairs.question: What are the options for users who require `sudo` functionality for Apptainer on Alliance systems?
qa_pairs.answer: If you require `sudo`, you can install Linux, Apptainer, and `sudo` in a virtual machine on a system you control to build your images, then upload them to Alliance systems. Alternatively, you can submit a ticket to Alliance staff asking for help to build the required images. Apptainer version 1.1.x and newer also offers improved support for `--fakeroot`, which may allow building some images without needing `sudo`.
